name: The Platinum Card® from American Express

welcome_offer.description: Earn up to 175,000 Membership Rewards points after spending $12,000 in eligible purchases in the first 6 months.

earning_rates.notes: Booked directly with airlines or through American Express Travel, on up to $500,000 per calendar year.
On prepaid hotels booked through American Express Travel.

lounge_access.other: Delta Sky Club (10 visits/yr), Escape, Plaza Premium, Airspace, Lufthansa, Universal.

other_benefits.name: Fine Hotels + Resorts
other_benefits.description: Average $550 value in perks like 4pm late checkout, breakfast, room upgrade.

recurring_credits.name: Airline Fee Credit
recurring_credits.description: $200 annual credit for airline incidentals (seat upgrades, baggage, etc.). Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Fine Hotels + Resorts Credit
recurring_credits.description: $300 semi-annual ($600/year) for prepaid FHR or THC bookings via Amex Travel.

recurring_credits.name: Digital Entertainment Credit
recurring_credits.description: $20 monthly credit for digital entertainment (Paramount+, Audible, Peacock, etc.). Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Equinox Credit
recurring_credits.description: $10 monthly credit for Equinox gym membership or Equinox+ app.

recurring_credits.name: Walmart+ Credit
recurring_credits.description: $10 monthly credit for Walmart+ membership (formerly called Walmart+. Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Resy Credit
recurring_credits.description: $100 quarterly ($400/year) for Resy restaurant bookings. Must pay with Amex Gold.

recurring_credits.name: lululemon Credit
recurring_credits.description: $75 quarterly ($300/year) at lululemon. Must pay with Amex Gold.

recurring_credits.name: Uber Cash
recurring_credits.description: $15 monthly ($180/year) for Uber rides and Uber Eats in the US. Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100 credit every 4 years for Global Entry or $85 for TSA PreCheck.

recurring_credits.name: Hotel Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $300 semi-annually on prepaid Fine Hotels + Resorts or The Hotel Collection bookings via Amex Travel.

recurring_credits.name: Uber One Credit
recurring_credits.description: Statement credits for auto-renewing Uber One membership.

recurring_credits.name: Oura Ring Credit
recurring_credits.description: Credit for Oura Ring purchase at ouraring.com.
